testcase.name: csvExporterShouldCreateFile
testcase.system-out: 13:41:16.798 [DEBUG] com.novafx.math.AstFunctionSampler - Sampled 13 points from FunctionDefinition{x='cos(t)', y='sin(t)', z='0', start=0.0, end=6.283, step=0.5} 13:41:16.800 [INFO ] com.novafx.export.CsvExporter - Exported 13 points to CSV: /tmp/junit-1742779155832809877/test.csv

testcase.name: mcFunctionExporterShouldCreateFile

testcase.name: csvExporterShouldHaveCorrectHeaders

testcase.name: allExportersShouldProduceSamePointCount
mcFunctionExporterShouldHaveProjectMetadata
